name: Skyline Furniture Hendrix Dining Chair in Winter Botanical Red: Linen & Cotton Blend, Armless Design
description:
Secure the ideal dining chair for your table when you select this versatile piece. With its hand upholstered on trend fabric, and superior construction, you can feel good about adding it to your overall dining design—in multiples! Manufactured in Illinois and Made to order in Illinois, this square chair is graced with tasteful tapered wooden legs that add an air of sophistication. In addition, the armless construction makes it a sensible choice for dining areas both large and small.

Overall Width: 19 Inches

Overall Height: 37 Inches

Overall Depth: 25 Inches

Seat Height: 20 Inches
